name: coscientist
description: Academic research-agent toolkit. 70 skills + 40 sub-agent personas covering deep research (10-phase Expedition pipeline), manuscript audit/critique/draft, citation graph + reference agent, hypothesis tournaments with Elo + auto-prune, novelty + publishability + red-team gates, OpenAlex/Consensus/S2 paper discovery. Pure-stdlib SQLite-backed cache. Markdown-first manuscripts, pandoc export to LaTeX/docx.
